description: Composition Royal blue round neck jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, is engineered with ClimaCool technology, has Chelsea football Club badge printed on the left chest, adidas brand logo on the right chest and sleeves, patented adidas 3-Stripes running down the sleeves and mesh fabric along the sides for breathability Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logo Dry in shade Warm iron Winning three league championships, three FA Cups and two league cups, the Blues are shining stars of the new century. Flaunt your pride in the Chelsea Club with this Adidas jersey. It features tonal horizontal stripes accented by the 3-Stripes to create a bold new Chelsea look, adding to your style quotient, while the ClimaCool technology ensures you stay sweat-free all day. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1” and shoulders 18.5”
